title: Fans speculate GTA 6 Trailer 3 could drop August 7 after Take-Two changes earnings call schedule
summary: Take-Two Interactive has moved its quarterly earnings call to August 7 at 8AM ET, earlier than usual, sparking speculation that Rockstar may release the highly anticipated third trailer around the same time. The timing change is seen as unusual since earnings calls typically happen after market close, leading fans to believe major news could accompany the report.

title: Rockstar website update hints at possible GTA 6 Trailer 3 announcement
summary: Rockstar Games has begun updating its website and removed the pre-order banner, which historically signals incoming announcements. Fans are speculating this could mean the third trailer is imminent, though no official confirmation has been provided by the studio.

title: GTA 6 fans divided over day and night cycle duration preferences
summary: The community is debating whether GTA 6 should keep the 48-minute day-night cycle from GTA 5 and Red Dead Redemption 2 or extend it to 60-90 minutes for greater immersion. Some players want longer cycles to better appreciate atmospheric details like sunrises and weather, while others argue the current pace works better for gameplay flow.

title: Rockstar employees allege mandatory crunch built into contracts ahead of GTA 6 launch
summary: Members of the Rockstar Game Workers Union have accused the studio of embedding overtime opt-outs into employment contracts that bypass UK labor protections. Workers also claim the company maintains unequal pay practices and inconsistent bonus structures, with up to 20 percent of expected compensation sometimes withheld based on subjective evaluations.

title: Potential strike action threatened at Rockstar as developers push for union recognition
summary: Rockstar developers are pursuing unionization under the IWGB Game Workers Union and have warned of possible strike action if the company does not voluntarily recognize the union. The movement focuses on addressing crunch culture, pay transparency, and flexible working arrangements during the critical final months before GTA 6's November launch.
